_comment: Per-agent model/effort selection for the tess runner. Difficulty (easy|medium|hard, default medium) picks the model; the pipeline stage picks the effort; overrides[stage][difficulty] pins a specific cell's model and/or effort. See tess/README.md § Model & Effort Selection. Built-in defaults live in scripts/lib/model-selection.mjs; this file is deep-merged over them, so a partial file only restates what it changes. model/effort values are agent-specific — a null or missing value means 'pass no flag, use the agent's own default'.
